name: Leaf Lettuce

zone_9a.harvest_window: 7 weeks from planting, succession sow every 2-3 weeks

pest_notes: Interplant with chives or garlic to deter aphids.
container_notes: Bolt-prone in heat — shade cart essential May onward. Succession plant every 2-3 weeks for continuous harvest. Shallow roots — 4-inch depth is enough.

succession_plan.note: 4 plants per sqft, 7 weeks to harvest = always have salad ready
